name: Gynosphinx
damage_resistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical weapons

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Darkness
actions.description: Magical darkness spreads from a point you choose within range to fill a 15-foot-radius sphere for the duration. The darkness spreads around corners. A creature with darkvision can't see through this darkness, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it.

actions.name: Dispel Magic
actions.description: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of 3rd level or lower on the target ends. For each spell of 4th level or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability. The DC equals 10 + the spell's level. On a successful check, the spell ends.

actions.name: Banishment
actions.description: You attempt to send one creature that you can see within range to another plane of existence. The target must succeed on a charisma saving throw or be banished.

actions.name: Greater Invisibility
actions.description: You or a creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. Anything the target is wearing or carrying is invisible as long as it is on the target's person.

legendary_actions.name: Claw Attack
legendary_actions.description: The sphinx makes one claw attack.

special_abilities.name: Multiattack
special_abilities.description: The sphinx makes two claw attacks.

special_abilities.name: Inscrutable
special_abilities.description: The sphinx is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as any divination spell that it refuses. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain the sphinx's intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

special_abilities.name: Magic Weapons
special_abilities.description: The sphinx's weapon attacks are magical.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.description:
The sphinx is a 9th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 16, +8 to hit with spell attacks). It requires no material components to cast its spells. The sphinx has the following wizard spells prepared:

- Cantrips (at will): mage hand, minor illusion, prestidigitation
- 1st level (4 slots): detect magic, identify, shield
- 2nd level (3 slots): darkness, locate object, suggestion
- 3rd level (3 slots): dispel magic, remove curse, tongues
- 4th level (3 slots): banishment, greater invisibility
- 5th level (1 slot): legend lore

reactions.name: Shield
reactions.description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack, and you take no damage from magic missile.
